rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Regarding Deposition Of Conservatee F Elena Sosa, Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, June 14, 2007 1) Conservator motion for a protective order regarding the deposition of F. Elena Sosa Denied. The fact of an appointment of a conservator does not prove that the witness is disqualified as a witness within the meaning of Evidence Code Section 701. By participating in the deposition, counsel for the conservator does not waive the right to object to any testimony pursuant to Evidence Code Section 701 and to prove in any further proceeding that the witness should be disqualified as a witness. = (610/BEC)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Conservators Notice Of Motion And Motion Compelling Attendance Of Defendant Viviane Sosa At Stipulated Deposition; Declaration Of Daniel D Murphy In Support
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, June 14, 2007. 2) Conservator's motion to compel the attendance of defendant Viviane Sosa at deposition Granted. Defendant is ordered to appear for deposition at a mutually convenient time within 15 days of notice of this order. The Court finds that defendant made, without substantial justification, an unmeritorious objection to discovery. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $715 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. = (610/BEC)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Notice Of Motion To Strike; Demurrer And Motion To Strike The Entirety Of Cross Complainant Beatrice Kopilenkos Cross Complaint Against Vera Kopilenko And Remax Realtors Of San Francisco;
rulings.Rulings: Demurrer granted w/leave to amend. Motion to strike is taken off calendar. Request for Judicial Notice is granted.
